parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json;
return Array.from({ length: input.ideaCount }).map((_, index) => ({ json: { ...input, iteration: index + 1 } }));

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: 'llama-3.1-8b-instant', messages: [ { role: 'user', content: 'Generate exactly one TikTok content idea for category ' + $json.category + '. Return only the idea text, no numbering, no explanation.' } ] } }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { topic: String($json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || '').trim(), category: $('Expand Ideas').item.json.category, workflowRunId: $('Expand Ideas').item.json.workflowRunId, template_id: $('Expand Ideas').item.json.template_id, tiktok_account_open_id: $('Expand Ideas').item.json.tiktok_account_open_id } }];
